entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 12
entries.excerpt: God appeared to Abram “and said to him: Go out… from thy father’s house, and go into a land that I will show thee. And I will make of thee a great nation” (Gen 12:1–2). Abram left his parents because they would not go with him; but he took Lot with him, because Lot believed the promise that had been given to Abram. And God, though He did not make Lot a sharer in Abram’s inheritance, yet would not allow the sons of Abram either to enter into the inheritance of Lot’s sons. So Abram took Lot and Sarai with him, and went into the land of Canaan (Gen 12:5).…
